parameters.name: dfs_account_balance
parameters.description: Show DataForSEO account balance, lifetime spend, and timezone. Free, use first to check budget.

parameters.name: dfs_serp_google_organic
parameters.description: Google organic SERP for a keyword. Common location_codes: 2276=Germany, 2840=USA, 2826=UK, 2040=Austria, 2756=Switzerland. Common language_codes: de, en, fr, it, es. ~$0.002 per call.

value.location_code: ={{ $fromAI('location_code', 'Numeric location, e.g. 2276 for Germany, 2840 for USA', 'string') }}

parameters.name: dfs_serp_google_organic_advanced
parameters.description: Google SERP advanced (with featured snippets, Knowledge Graph, People Also Ask, sitelinks). ~$0.002 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_search_volume
parameters.description: Monthly search volume + CPC + competition for a list of keywords. Pass keywords as comma-separated list. ~$0.075 per call regardless of keyword count.

parameters.name: dfs_keywords_for_keywords
parameters.description: Find related keywords for a seed (Google Ads). Returns related keywords with volume, CPC, competition. ~$0.075 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_google_trends
parameters.description: Google Trends interest-over-time for up to 5 keywords (comma-separated). Optional date range YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: dfs_keyword_overview
parameters.description: Full SEO profile of a single keyword: search volume, KD, CPC, intent, SERP features. ~$0.01 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_keyword_ideas
parameters.description: Semantic keyword ideas from a seed keyword (DataForSEO Labs). ~$0.011 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_keyword_difficulty
parameters.description: Bulk keyword difficulty (0-100) for a list of keywords. ~$0.01 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_ranked_keywords
parameters.description: Keywords a domain ranks for organically: position, search volume, traffic estimate. Pass domain (no http://, no path) as 'target'. ~$0.0105 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_competitors_domain
parameters.description: Top competing domains for a target domain in the SERPs. ~$0.0105 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_backlinks_summary
parameters.description: Backlink profile overview for a domain. NOTE: Requires Backlinks API subscription on DataForSEO; without it returns 40204 access-denied error.

parameters.name: dfs_backlinks_referring_domains
parameters.description: List of referring domains for a target. NOTE: Requires Backlinks API subscription.

parameters.name: dfs_backlinks_anchors
parameters.description: Anchor text distribution for a domain's backlinks. NOTE: Requires Backlinks API subscription.

parameters.name: dfs_onpage_instant
parameters.description: Live single-page audit: HTTP status, meta tags, on-page checks. Pass full URL with protocol. ~$0.000125 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_lighthouse_audit
parameters.description: Lighthouse audit (Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Best Practices, PWA). Set for_mobile=false for desktop. ~$0.00425 per call.

value.for_mobile: ={{ $fromAI('for_mobile', 'true for mobile, false for desktop (default true)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: dfs_domain_technologies
parameters.description: Detected tech stack of a domain (CMS, frameworks, analytics, hosting, etc.). ~$0.01 per call.

parameters.name: dfs_my_business_info
parameters.description: Google My Business listings for a search query in a location. Returns name, address, rating, categories, hours. ~$0.0054 per call.
